name: 7 up Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Add flour, lemon extract, and 7UP; mix well.
4. Pour batter into greased angel food (or bundt) pan.
5. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes or until done.
6. Sprinkle with confectioners' sugar.
